dialogue_tree.greeting: Welcome, young adventurer. I am The Oracle. Ask me about your {vocation} when you are ready to leave this island.
dialogue_tree.farewell: May the gods guide your path.

vocation.text: When you reach level 8, you may choose a vocation. Would you like to become a {knight}, {paladin}, {sorcerer}, or {druid}?

knight.text: Knights are masters of melee combat with the highest health. Do you wish to become a knight? Say {yes} or {no}.

yes.text: You are now a Knight! Go forth and conquer.

no.text: Very well. What vocation interests you then?

paladin.text: Paladins are holy warriors skilled with distance weapons. Do you wish to become a paladin? Say {yes} or {no}.

yes.text: You are now a Paladin! May your aim be true.

no.text: Very well. What vocation interests you then?

sorcerer.text: Sorcerers wield devastating attack magic. Do you wish to become a sorcerer? Say {yes} or {no}.

yes.text: You are now a Sorcerer! Harness the arcane.

no.text: Very well. What vocation interests you then?

druid.text: Druids are masters of nature and healing magic. Do you wish to become a druid? Say {yes} or {no}.

yes.text: You are now a Druid! Nature is your ally.

no.text: Very well. What vocation interests you then?

name.text: I am The Oracle. I have guided adventurers for centuries.

job.text: I help young adventurers choose their path in life.
